title: Redstone Capacitor
description: Adds a Redstone component inspired by capacitors
body: A redstone component inspired by capacitors. When given power from behind, it will charge up. It will then output its current charge level out the front, or any other side using a comparator. When power is disconnected, it will slowly lose its charge until it turns off. It has two modes: 1. Normal - Stored charge slowly increments over time 2. Instant charge - Stored charge immediately set to 15 when powered It is crafted with 2 Copper ingots, 1 Redstone torch and 3 stone blocks.
